title: lithocarpus guinieri
intro: Lithocarpus guinieri, also known as Guinean Lithocarpus, is a species of tree in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to West Africa. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus guinieri include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Lithocarpus guinieri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and proper herbal preparations.
